description: CompositionRed Arsenal jersey made of 100% recycled polyester Dri Fit mesh like fabric, that has round neckline with red ribbing, short white sleeves with red rubber print stripe from the shoulders to the middle of the sleeve, Arsenal club seal on the upper left chest in rubber print, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest, Fly Emirates written in rubber print below the swoosh and authentic jock tag at left hemFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Do not dry cleanLine dryThe 2011/12 Arsenal Jersey pays tribute to the “Great Innovator's” influence with the traditional red body and white sleeves that have come to define the team. Distinctive design details and breathability offer comfort on and off the field. Lightweight and breathable, the Arsenal Jersey was designed with the environment in mind. Its sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from 100% recycled polyester. Team this jersey with jeans or with tracks and cleats while out playing football with friends.
